title: Port of Cordova Requires All Vessels Using the Port or Harbor Facilities Carry Liability Insurance
summary: The Port of Cordova requires that all vessels using the Port or Harbor facilities, both on land and in water, carry liability insurance. title: April 20, 2024, State DOT is scheduled to close the section of Whitshed Road at Heney Creek, in both directions.
summary: On April 20, 2024, the State DOT is scheduled to close the section of Whitshed Road at Heney Creek in both directions, to repair the guardrail on the bridge. This section of the road will be closed for two hours at a time, followed by one hour of being open. The closure will begin at 8 am with the f...

title: State of Alaska releases five-year timber sale plan for southern Southeast
summary: This state map indicates the proposed timber sale (diagonal stripes) along Woodpecker Road on Petersburg’s Mitkof Island. The red dashes indicate proposed roads. This sale proposes clear-cutting approximately 369 acres of old growth. (image/Division of Forestry) Alaska’s Division of Forestry released its plan for selling timber in Southeast Alaska for 2024-2029. The plan seeks to turn some old-growth stands into areas that can be harvested repeatedly in the decades to come. The State will...

title: Japan Steps Up Its Arctic Engagement
summary: This op-ed summarizes Japan's latest Arctic strategy as Japan continues to step up its engagement in the Arctic region. The post Japan Steps Up Its Arctic Engagement appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .
